name: Disability Return — Medical Expenses, RDSP, and DTC Activation
description: Complete Marcus Chen-Williams's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return in StudioTax 2024 using the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen_williams\. The return must include the Disability Tax Credit (T2201), RDSP withdrawal (T4A) details, itemized medical expenses, and spouse information (Elena, net income $68,000). Save the completed return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\marcus_chen_williams.24t.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide RC4064 (Disability-Related Information) 2024; CRA RDSP Guide RC4460
metadata.key_complexity: DTC activation; T4A Box 28 (taxable) vs Box 131 (non-taxable); medical expense itemization (3% threshold); married filing
